final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input reset,  
    input [15:0] audio_in,  
    output reg [7:0] audio_out  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            audio_out <= 8'b0;  
        end else begin  
            audio_out <= audio_in[15:8];  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
